text: An older man passes by as the train pulls into the station
a train that is on the train tracks next to trees
The people walk down the street holding umbrellas.
This white plate is holding a pizza with mushrooms on it.
The toilet in the bathroom is filled with a bunch of ice.
Several men riding horses and a bull in a rodeo pit.
Two marble vases one containing white flowers, the other green grass.
A herd of zebras eating grass and enjoying nature.
A multi colored cat standing over a white laptop.
A pair of gold scissors are sitting on the table.
